lines: Seven houses of memory. A single obsession with the exceptional.
Each flacon is a dialogue between Guerlain's heritage and the hands of the artists, jewellers and Maisons who reimagined it —
one irreplaceable piece at a time.

products.name: Shalimar — 90th Anniversary
products.description: Two inseparable birds, wing to wing — an emblem of the burning passion between Emperor Shah Jahan and his wife Mumtaz Mahal.

products.name: Shalimar — 100th Anniversary
products.description: A meeting of arts and crafts, design and technical innovation, drawn from the gardens of Shalimar themselves.

products.name: Shalimar Bee Bottle
products.description: A spectacular flacon born of Tunisian travels, 1980s pop culture and Hollywood glamour — hand-adorned with sparkling rhinestones.

products.name: The Bee Bottle
products.description: Three arts intimately linked. Inspired by Matisse's celebrated painting Music (1939) — hand-painted in his palette, with philodendron leaves and the curved forms of a guitar.

products.name: The Bee Bottle
products.description: A majestic moon gilded in 24-carat fine gold, crowned with three stars set from crystal pearls.
products.volume: 1 L · plus a unique 1.5 L piece for Shalimar's 100th anniversary

products.name: Le Flacon Quadrilobé
products.description: Complex depth held within refined simplicity — subtle, imperfectly curved gestures. The iconic 1908 flacon becomes Ufan's canvas: heritage porcelain transformed into art through artisanal fireworks.
products.volume: 2 L — 125 ml bottle + 30 ml atomizer + funnel

products.name: L'Heure Bleue — 100th Anniversary
products.description: The iconic Quadrilobé bottle cast in deep, magnetic crystal blue by Baccarat's master glassmakers, its neck adorned with a sumptuous Gripoix jewel — an impression of Paris at twilight, 1912.

products.name: Paradis Interdit
products.description: A crystal bee, its wings faceted like diamonds by the celebrated Place Vendôme jeweller — a majestic homage to the House's beloved emblem.

products.name: Muguet — Millésime 2023
products.description: Celebrating 170 years of the Bee Bottle. A realistic ceramic bell drawn from lily-of-the-valley, embroidered with sprigs of the flower.

products.name: Muguet
products.specialty: Sculptor in stucco & precious metal leaf
products.description: Twenty-four bells hand-sculpted from marble powder, gilded in 22-carat gold leaf with green leaves. Composed by Thierry Wasser to evoke freshly picked lily-of-the-valley.

products.name: Muguet
products.description: An AI-assisted reinterpretation of the Bee Bottle. An 18-carat gold structure inspired by Art Nouveau, hung with pearl-like lily-of-the-valley bells.

products.name: Bouquet de la Mariée
products.description: The Bee Bottle, first created in 1853 for Empress Eugénie's wedding. A handcrafted apple tree embraces the flacon in copper branches — one of its 29 golden flowers detaches to be worn as a brooch.

products.name: Cherry Blossom
products.description: An ode to the Japanese Hanami. Two pale pink enamelled Sakura flowers detach as jewellery, set with 24-carat gold details and sparkling crystals — hand-crafted in the Ferrandis Paris ateliers.

products.name: Cherry Blossom
products.description: Hand-painted by the artist in Paris. An acrylic floral ornament — white for winter snow, pink for the sakura of spring, soft green for summer. The spirit of Hanami.

products.name: Cherry Blossom
products.description: A glittering adornment of intense fuchsia petals, finished with a satin cord and combed barbiche — the Swarovski crystal savoir-faire at its most luminous.
